hero.title: India's First App for Lawyer Consultation
hero.subtitle: Connecting you with the best legal minds across the country. We're on a mission to make legal help accessible, affordable, and hassle-free for every Indian.

features.title: Why We Stand Out
features.subtitle: Discover the advantages that make MLawyer the preferred choice for legal consultations

items.title: Face to Face Consultation
items.desc: Connect personally with experts through high-quality video calls from anywhere, anytime.

items.title: Verified Advocates
items.desc: Access a network of 5000+ thoroughly vetted and experienced legal professionals across India.

items.title: Affordable Pricing
items.desc: Get top-tier legal advice starting at just ₹550. Transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

items.title: No Need to Travel
items.desc: Save time and effort by consulting from the comfort of your home or office.

items.title: Secure & Confidential
items.desc: Your privacy is our priority. All consultations and data are protected securely.

items.title: 24/7 Availability
items.desc: Book consultations anytime. Our platform is available round the clock for your convenience.

missionVision.title: Our Purpose
missionVision.subtitle: Driving change in the legal landscape of India

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To democratize access to legal justice by making expert consultation accessible, affordable, and understandable for every Indian citizen, regardless of their location, language, or economic background. We believe everyone deserves quality legal guidance.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the most trusted and comprehensive digital legal ecosystem in India, bridging the gap between those seeking justice and those preserving it. We envision a future where legal help is just a click away for 1.4 billion Indians.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We maintain the highest standards of honesty and transparency in all our dealings.

values.title: Accessibility
values.desc: Legal help should be available to everyone, not just the privileged few.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We continuously improve our platform to serve you better with cutting-edge technology.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: From an idea to India's leading legal consultation platform

milestones.title: The Beginning
milestones.desc: MLawyer was founded with a vision to democratize legal access in India.

milestones.title: Platform Launch
milestones.desc: Launched our mobile app with 500+ verified advocates across 10 cities.

milestones.title: Rapid Growth
milestones.desc: Crossed 25,000+ consultations and expanded to 200+ cities pan-India.

cta.title: Ready to Solve Your Legal Issues?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied users who found the right legal help on MLawyer. Get expert advice from verified advocates at affordable prices.
